CustomField.description: Used in SMS Mogli flow scheduled path ((Study) Mogli SMS Send Study Night Reminder & Return Instructions) to time the SMS Message to provide information about returning the device to Huxley Medical 1 day after the Study's Expected Study Date (datetime). https://basecamp.com/2583453/projects/19794483/todos/515687396
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used in SMS Mogli flow scheduled path to time the SMS Message to provide information about returning the device to Huxley Medical 1 day after the Study's Expected Study Date (datetime)
CustomField.label: Return Instruction Date
